title: What we know on Day 27 of the US and Israel’s war with Iran | CNN
text:
Source: CNN

Talks between the United States and Iran are ongoing – though both sides are describing things very differently.  US President Donald Trump claimed Tehran wants tomake a deal“so badly,” while Iran stressed that Washington’s desire for a deal is “an admission of defeat.”

Meanwhile, the realities of war are hitting home in the US – with high public dissatisfaction, a new postal surcharge, and bipartisan skepticism in Congress.

Here’s what to know on Day 27.

See Full Web Article
